title: More Ocular Eye Trim - Spryzeen's Knight Armor
description: Fixes the eye trim in the pack to include more eyelike patterns.
body:
# More Ocular Eye Trim
This texture pack give the Eye trim more eye-shaped patterns while using the [Spryzeen's Knight Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-knight-armor) resource pack.

**All rights** (including but not limited to copywrite, redistribution and modification) will remain owned by [Spryzeen](https://modrinth.com/user/Spryzeen).

<details>
<summary>Main Features</summary>
  
- Replaces the Eye trim in Spryzeen's Knight Armors with my own custom one.
- This custom pattern is designed to better represent the eye theme of the trim.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- The original pack: [Spryzeen's Knight Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-knight-armor)
- Make sure to place this pack **above** the original pack.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Conflicts</summary>

- This pack has a content redundancy with the vanilla trim system. (Not recommended to install this as a stand-alone).

</details>
